articles.author: Steve Douglas
articles.title: McIlroy accuses DeChambeau of trying to ‘hold the tournament hostage’ at British Open - AP News
articles.description: Rory McIlroy has saved one of his best shots at the British Open for Bryson DeChambeau. The world No. 2 didn’t hold back when asked for his thoughts on DeChambeau’s conduct late Friday when the American was involved in a lengthy, heated post-round exchange wi…
articles.content:
SOUTHPORT, England (AP) Rory McIlroy saved one of his best shots at the British Open on Saturday for Bryson DeChambeau.

articles.author: Shira Ovide
articles.title: How data centers became a symbol of Americans’ rage - The Washington Post
articles.description: Data centers have become a lightning rod for people's frustrations over corporate power, public trust and the costs of the AI boom.
articles.content:
Kyle Schmidt ticked through what makes him irate about the massive Google data center slated for construction about a mile away from his home near Sand Springs, Oklahoma.
